summary: Frontend testing completed for NASSAQ system improvements. All 6 features tested and verified: Landing page teacher section removed, hero stats unified with Platform Impact section, footer social media links (5/5), Schedule page TeacherScheduleGrid with new structure (rows=teachers, columns=days×periods), multi-level header, and sticky teacher column.
critical_code_review_comments: LandingPage.jsx - Teacher banner section ('هل أنت معلم؟') successfully removed
LandingPage.jsx - Hero section traction stats now use platformStats from API, unified with Platform Impact section
Footer.jsx - All 5 social media links implemented with correct URLs and data-testid attributes
TeacherScheduleGrid.jsx - Complete redesign with rows=teachers, columns=days×periods structure
TeacherScheduleGrid.jsx - Multi-level header implemented (Days header → Periods header)
TeacherScheduleGrid.jsx - Sticky teacher column using 'sticky start-0' for RTL-aware positioning
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working correctly. Landing page has unified stats from API. Footer has all 5 social media links. Schedule page uses TeacherScheduleGrid with teacher-based rows and day×period columns.

1_teacher_banner_removed.description: Landing page 'هل أنت معلم؟' section has been removed
verified: No teacher-banner section found in page
No 'هل أنت معلم؟' text found in page content
CTA section still has 'إذا كنت معلمًا' card but not the separate banner

2_hero_stats_unified.description: Hero section stats are unified with Platform Impact section (from API)
verified: Hero traction section shows: +110 مدرسة, +6,000 طالب, +8,000 ولي أمر, +750 معلم
Platform Impact section shows same numbers: 110+, 6,000+, 750+, 8,000+
Both sections use platformStats state from /api/public/stats API

3_footer_social_links.description: Footer has all 5 social media links
verified: X (Twitter): https://x.com/nassaqapp - data-testid='social-twitter'
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nassaqapp/ - data-testid='social-instagram'
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/nassaqapp - data-testid='social-linkedin'
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@nassaqapp - data-testid='social-tiktok'
Snapchat: https://www.snapchat.com/add/nassaqapp - data-testid='social-snapchat'
TeacherScheduleGrid component found with data-testid='teacher-schedule-grid'
Rows display teachers: ريم القحطاني, سارة العمري, محمد العمري, هند السهلي, etc.
Columns display 5 days: الأحد, الاثنين, الثلاثاء, الأربعاء, الخميس
Each day has 6 period sub-columns
Session cards show subject and class info

5_multi_level_header.description: Schedule grid has multi-level header (Days → Periods)
verified: Level 1: Days header (الأحد, الاثنين, etc.) with period count
Level 2: Period numbers (1-6) with start times
Teacher column header shows 'المعلم' with teacher count

6_sticky_teacher_column.description: Teacher column is sticky (remains visible when scrolling)
verified: Teacher column has CSS class 'sticky start-0 bg-background z-10'
Uses 'start-0' for RTL-aware positioning
Teacher names remain visible in screenshots after horizontal scroll
